milestones.title: Compiler Source Package And Seed Contract
Token, Span, Diagnostic, And Lexer Seed
Primitive And Standard Library Gap Budget
Seed Fixtures, Docs, And Next-Stage Handoff

directions.summary: Establish the `.mlfp` package, fixture, and test harness used by compiler frontend seed modules.
preconditions: Inspect package-mode CLI/API entrypoints, current package fixtures, docs/mlfp-self-boot-readiness.md, docs/mlfp-language-reference.md, MLF.Program.CLI, and focused program-run tests at HEAD.
parallel_hints: Serial foundation work; do not fan out before the seed source contract is selected.

directions.summary: Define frontend seed ADTs and implement a minimal lexer/tokenization proof over the selected input representation.
preconditions: Inspect Prelude list/string/Nat support, primitive inventory, interpreter IO/value rendering behavior, fixture shape, and current parser diagnostics.
parallel_hints: Serial with parser work until the token contract settles; gap-budget documentation may split only after concrete missing APIs are observed.

directions.summary: Implement a parser over the seed token stream and prove it returns a small AST or diagnostic result through interpreter execution.
preconditions: Use the token contract from milestone 2, package seed harness from milestone 1, current `.mlfp` ADT/case/typeclass behavior, and focused interpreter-run fixture expectations.
parallel_hints: Serial until the parser result contract is stable; docs can update after runnable evidence exists.

directions.summary: Classify every primitive and stdlib gap exposed by the lexer/parser seed and decide which gaps must be solved before a larger compiler component.
preconditions: Inspect runnable lexer/parser seed evidence, current Prelude source, primitive inventory, runtime IO support, backend/native primitive support, and self-boot readiness ledger.
parallel_hints: Can run after milestone 3 and can be planned independently from native/backend classification if ownership stays disjoint.

directions.summary: Record and test how the frontend seed behaves across source checking, interpreter/runtime, backend/native, object-code, and package-build layers.
preconditions: Inspect parser seed result contract, primitive/stdlib budget, backend emission tests, native IO/runtime docs, and current fail-closed diagnostics.
parallel_hints: Can run after milestone 4, alongside docs work, if it does not change the seed contract.

directions.summary: Update fixture evidence, docs, and the readiness ledger so the next roadmap can choose a larger compiler component without re-litigating this seed.
preconditions: Use completed seed evidence, primitive/stdlib gap budget, layer classification, current README/language-reference/architecture docs, and clean baseline gates.
parallel_hints: Docs and fixture polish may be extracted separately after milestones 4 and 5 are done.

milestone-1-status.selector: ### [done] 1. Compiler Source Package And Seed Contract

milestone-2-status.selector: ### [done] 2. Token, Span, Diagnostic, And Lexer Seed

milestone-4-status.selector: ### [done] 4. Primitive And Standard Library Gap Budget

milestone-6-status.selector: ### [done] 6. Seed Fixtures, Docs, And Next-Stage Handoff
